title: Genome-wide Sequencing Facilitates Quantitative Analysis of Wild Type and CRAF-/- cells
summary: We utilized C-Raf-knockout cell model and carried out RNA-seq analysis of the global transcriptomes in wild-type and C-Raf-knockout cells treated with EGF, a potent activator of MAPK (Mitogen-activated protein kinase) pathway, or vehicle control.
